heading: Duty to maintain tax-exempt status
label: 80508 Duty to maintain tax-exempt status
text: The corporation shall maintain its status as an organization exempt from taxation under the Internal Revenue Code of 1986 ( et seq.).26 U.S.C. 1
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)8050836:1614 (1st sentence)., (1st sentence), .Dec. 4, 1980Pub. L. 96–497, § 1594 Stat. 2597
